title: Bump corelib submodule for CI checkout submodules fix

source.subject: chore(corelib): bump submodule for CI checkout submodules fix.

body:
## Outcome

Bump submodule for CI checkout submodules fix.

## Context

- Workstream **ci-release** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **CI workflows and deploy infra** (`v02-ci-deploy-infra`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`f97e8e7`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/f97e8e7) — chore(corelib): bump submodule for CI checkout submodules fix.
